name: Catalan Saute of Calamari (Squid) in Onion Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean calamari and cut tubes crosswise into 1/2-inch rings. Dry calamari on paper towels and reserve.
2. In a medium frying pan, heat 3 tablespoons oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the calamari to the hot oil and sauté until the rings turn opaque white, about 30 seconds to one minute. Transfer calamari to a bowl and set aside.
4. Wipe pan dry, add remaining oil and heat.
5. Add chile pepper and heat until it turns dark. Remove chile with a slotted spoon and discard.
6. Add onions to the hot chile oil and cook, stirring, until onions are wilted, about 5 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to medium, partially cover pan, and cook, stirring occasionally, until onions are caramelized (golden brown), 30-40 minutes. Add more oil if onions are dry or sticking to the pan.
8. Season with salt and pepper. Add calamari and stir until heated throughout.
9. Serve with slices of hot or toasted French bread.
